title: Farmer's Delight: Plus
description: Farmer's Delight addon, which adds a lot of new delicious meals in a vanilla style.
body:
## Farmer's Delight: Plus

![Farmer's Delight: Plus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72ce69d3142723765ab022b611215cee9c23ae70.png)

**Farmer's Delight: Plus** is a mod that will expand the original cooking presented by the Farmer's Delight mod.

The mod adds a lot of new **food**, a new type of noodles and dough. You can try assorted pufferfish, rice with honey and berries, or **pancakes** with a variety of fillings! **New feasts** are also introduced by this mod.

The mod is made entirely in **vanilla style**, each item is designed to avoid abuse and is compatible with other mods such as Farmer's Respite and Create!

## About
The mod adds the ability to compress some items in a similar way to the Farmer's Delight mod. From 9 items, you can get a block that can be used for compact **storage** or **decoration**.

![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff3fee867ff32afec97a526e468ce3fc980deff9.png)

A lot of **vanilla-styled** meals are brought in by this mod. You can prepare meals on a crafting table or in a **cooking pot from Farmer's Delight**. The mod also adds new **drinks and snacks** that will serve as a great addition to your daily meals.

![Creative Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c36f607055e19fda8d2c5de4da4969499dfc1fb7.png)

## Compatibility
The mod is compatible with such mods as **Farmer's Respite**, **Autumnity** and **Create**. You don't need to install these mods to work with Farmer's Delight Plus, but you might use them to expand functionality and **features**.

![Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdc5276cdcc4f974c989778957db9efffab1c6b1.png)

## Requirement
This mod is an addon for the Farmer's Delight mod. You need to install the required mod before you are able to use this mod!

- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)

## Translations
This mod has been translated into **6 languages**! Machine and manual translation includes the following languages.
- de_DE (German)
- es_ES (Spanish)
- fr_FR (French)
- it_IT (Italian)
- pt_PT (Portuguese)
- ru_RU (Russian)
